objectives.text: Ask Hidden Rows what its names would expose.
Decide access to the private names.

stages.description: The undercroft roll joins water rights to denials, burial records, and old debt.
The roll proves residence, but a public copy would expose people who chose a hidden door.

stages.task: Access to the hidden names is settled
stages.description: The private household names now follow the access decision made at South Measure.
